description_long: This is a classic double-barreled shotgun with a traditional wooden stock and fore-end, featuring a smooth, polished finish. The barrels are long, parallel, and made of blued steel, giving the firearm a sleek and professional appearance. The receiver and trigger guard are metallic, with the trigger mechanism clearly visible beneath the barrels. The stock is ergonomically shaped for shoulder support and is finished in a rich brown wood grain. The overall design is streamlined, with no visible external magazine or advanced sighting systems. This type of firearm is commonly seen in hunting, sport shooting, or as a collector's item, and could be found in urban settings such as homes, gun shops, or police evidence rooms.
description: A double-barreled shotgun with a polished wooden stock and long, blued steel barrels. The design is classic and streamlined, with visible trigger and metallic receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock and long, parallel barrels.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrels, with the trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length and symmetry of the barrels and the wooden stock.
description_view_3: Front-angled view emphasizing the width of the barrels and the curvature of the stock.
